title: 6pcs 100ml Clear Glass Bottles with Pretty black Lids Small Glass Jars Mini Milk Bottles for Yogurt Pudding Jam
features: BPA Free & Food Safe - the glass jars are made of high quality thick glass which is Non-toxic.Size: D5.52cm x H7.36 cm
Leak Proof and Airtight - each small glass jars has a Pretty black sealed lid so they are also ideal for storing food.
Cute size is very convenient to carry. suitable for homemade yogurt, milk, parfait, pudding, jello, jam, honey, desserts or as ginger jars.
Oven, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe - you can directly put these glass jar into microwave, but please remove the lid first.
Danmu Art aims to provide the best service to our customers, please buy with confidence !
